product_name: "Hip Hop" Animated Easter Bunny — Singing/Dancing Plush in Denim Overalls (likely Gemmy, untested)
attributes: Likely Gemmy Industries • "Hip Hop" animated Easter bunny • White plush, ~17" • Yellow "HIP HOP" tee + denim overalls + red high-top sneakers • "PRESS HERE" tab (sings/dances) • FUNCTION UNTESTED • late 1990s–2000s
condition: Pre-owned, good display condition; mechanism UNTESTED
condition_notes: Animated "Hip Hop" Easter bunny — a white plush rabbit dressed in a yellow "HIP HOP" t-shirt, denim overalls, and red high-top sneakers, with a red "PRESS HERE" tab on the right cuff (these activate a song-and-dance routine). Almost certainly Gemmy Industries, the maker of this animated-plush line (late 1990s–early 2000s); no maker's tag has been photographed yet, so attribution is by line/styling, not a confirmed sewn-in label. FUNCTION IS UNTESTED — not yet powered/battery-checked, so song and motion are unverified from the single photo on hand. Plush is clean and bright with no obvious damage; a small handwritten retail price sticker is presently affixed to the shirt near the logo and should be removed before sale. Seasonal (Easter) item being prepped off-season (June).

square.note: Listed 2026-06-20 (+$12 ship). UNTESTED; ONLY 1 photo; remove price sticker + reshoot before final.

ebay.note: Draft to be created. List as UNTESTED / sold as-is for display unless function confirmed. Seasonal — demand peaks Feb–Apr; consider holding to next Easter or pricing to move now.
